name: Peanut Butter Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 packages 8 oz Cream cheese, room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbs, brown sugar and melted butter. Press into bottom and halfway up sides of a 9 inch springform pan or pie pan.
2. Beat peanut butter, sugar, cream cheese, 2 tablespoons butter and vanilla in a large bowl until smooth and creamy.
3. Beat cream until soft peaks form. Fold whipping cream into peanut butter mixture.
4. Spoon into crust. Refrigerate for 6 hours.
5. Melt chocolate with coffee in a double boiler over gently simmering water. Spread atop filling. Refrigerate until firm.
This recipe is served at The Tradewinds in the Virgin Islands.
